name: ima2-gen
description: Local OAuth image generation studio with classic and node workflows

scripts.prepack: npm run ui:build && npm run build:server && npm run build:cli
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:tests && npm run test:inventory && npm run ui:build && npm run build:server && npm run build:cli && npm run lint:pkg && npm run test:package-install
scripts.lint:pkg: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const req=['name','version','bin']; for(const k of req){if(!p[k])throw new Error('missing '+k)} const mustInclude=['bin/','lib/','routes/','skills/','integrations/comfyui/ima2_gen_bridge/__init__.py','integrations/comfyui/ima2_gen_bridge/nodes.py','integrations/comfyui/ima2_gen_bridge/README.md','assets/card-news/templates/','vendor/','server.js','LICENSE']; for(const f of mustInclude){if(!p.files.includes(f))throw new Error('files[] must include '+f)}"
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish && git push origin main --tags
